description: This file defines the RecipeStore class, which manages state related to recipes within a Flutter application. It handles loading recipes, favorites, filtering, and persistence, acting as a state management component for recipe data.

classes.name: RecipeStore
classes.description: A state management class extending ChangeNotifier that manages the list of recipes, favorites, filters, and synchronization with persistent storage.

methods.name: init
methods.description: Initializes the store, loading favorites and custom recipes asynchronously.

methods.name: _initAsync
methods.description: Asynchronous internal method to load persisted data and update the state.

methods.name: setQuery
methods.description: Updates the search query used for filtering recipes.

methods.name: setCategoryFilter
methods.description: Sets the category filter; null or empty clears the filter.

methods.name: setOnlyFavorites
methods.description: Toggles whether only favorite recipes are shown.

methods.name: toggleFavorite
methods.description: Adds or removes a recipe from favorites and updates persistent storage.

methods.name: upsertCustomRecipe
methods.description: Creates or updates a custom recipe and saves it persistently.

methods.name: deleteCustomRecipe
methods.description: Deletes a custom recipe and updates persistent storage.

methods.name: newBlankCustomRecipe
methods.description: Creates a new unsaved custom recipe draft with a unique ID.

methods.name: isFavorite
methods.description: Checks if a recipe ID is marked as favorite.

methods.name: findById
methods.description: Finds a recipe by its ID.
